name: Entity
desc: Base class for entity relative movement and rotation updates. Subclasses S15 (rel move), S16 (look), S17 (move+look).

subclasses.name: S17PacketEntityLookMove
subclasses.desc: Both relative move and rotation update.

notes: S14 is the abstract base — the actual packet IDs are 0x15 (S15), 0x16 (S16), 0x17 (S17). All share the same class hierarchy. The client adds the relative deltas to the entity's current server position to get the new position.

modules.name: ESP
modules.purpose: Track entity position/rotation updates for ESP rendering. S15 (rel move), S16 (look), S17 (both).

modules.name: Tracers
modules.purpose: Track entity position/rotation updates for ESP rendering. S15 (rel move), S16 (look), S17 (both).

modules.name: AntiBot
modules.purpose: Track entity position/rotation updates for ESP rendering. S15 (rel move), S16 (look), S17 (both).
